title: Would it drastically change the Eva Universe if
display_title: Would it drastically change the Eva Universe if
wikitext:
[]: Would it drastically change the Eva Universe if...             Quote Post by Deva Victrix » Sun Aug 25, 2013 1:58 am ...the Nerv crew listened to RAP MUSIC? Aoba gets to remain a metal head, but I'm imagining Gendo in the limousine we see him using in the movie - and it's playing RAP MUSIC. Really classic rap music like from Wu Tang (lol) or NWA or Dr. Dre (Chronic era). Would they pimp Asuka and Shinji's rides? Would Yui get spinners? They'd probably have to be, like, airplane wheel sized, and they'd have to go on her boot - I'm calling it a boot because it looks like that, but it's more, like, a piece of armor. She's already purple colored. Or maybe they'd get her stripperriffic heels a block long or so. Can Evangelion units twerk? For those unfamiliar with twerking, it involves shaking the hips rapidly so the ass fat jiggles. Yui has a pretty fat butt - it's what, a hundred meters across or thereabouts? If so, would it do anything to the attacking Angels? Perhaps NERV could deploy a miles-high stripper pole. Discuss. I am especially interested in the scenario of Yui and Kyoko twerking aggressively at the angels. I searched the forum, and while there is a discussion about rap being used thematically in the Eva series, nothing is said about if the characters were influenced by it.

[]:             Quote Post by Madonna » Sun Aug 25, 2013 9:14 am Imagine Gendo twerking and listening to hardcore rap, while leaving the fate of humanity in the hands of 14 year olds. Shinji is severly hurt on the ground while Gendo is back at the headquaters popping his booty to Jay Z and Public Enemy.

[]:             Quote Post by Deva Victrix » Sun Aug 25, 2013 9:17 am Madonna wrote: Imagine Gendo twerking and listening to hardcore rap, while leaving the fate of humanity in the hands of 14 year olds. Shinji is severly hurt on the ground while Gendo is back at the headquaters popping his booty to Jay Z and Public Enemy.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Aug 25, 2013 11:49 am Ritsuko would have immediately shot Gendo in EoE and rapped over his dead body, instead of allowing him to shoot her and go on to cause 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Aug 25, 2013 11:49 am NO. Of course it would change... :3

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Aug 25, 2013 12:20 pm Kaji could finally reveal that he likes big butts.

[]:             Quote Post by Rudy Redlin » Sun Aug 25, 2013 12:46 pm The problem here is that Yui doesn't have a fat butt. Sure, her butt may be a hundred meters across, but in proportion with the rest of her body, that's actually quite small. Taking this into account, I don't believe twerking at the Angels would do any real damage. It might work as a confusion tactic though. I sure as heck would be concerned if a giant killer war machine was shaking its derriere at me. Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Ritsuko would have immediately shot Gendo in EoE and rapped over his dead body

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Sun Aug 25, 2013 4:20 pm ...What's the sense of this thread...?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Aug 25, 2013 4:35 pm It's humor; that's why it's in the Chit-chat thread and not discussion. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Aug 25, 2013 5:00 pm Rudy Redlin wrote: The problem here is that Yui doesn't have a fat butt.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Aug 25, 2013 5:48 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: ANIMA disagrees. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Aug 25, 2013 6:20 pm iirc it's Shinji's heart that shared with Eva-01. Either way that's still quite a bigger hips-to-waist ratio for Shinji (even if you consider Q) June 2012 issue.

[]:             Quote Post by Deva Victrix » Sun Aug 25, 2013 6:33 pm In Sadamoto's manga, he over-emphasizes Yui's chest till it looks as if she has boobies. We gotta pair that up with this. Oh, and (obligatory) *puts on shades* DAT ASS.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Aug 25, 2013 7:19 pm ...no one except maybe Touji really seems the type for anything remotely rap-like. Then again, I admit that I do not comprehend this particular art form very well, maybe I'm just not getting the joke here.

[]:             Quote Post by Deva Victrix » Sun Aug 25, 2013 8:08 pm That's true. I mean, you wouldn't think Gendo Ikari, a scientist and a businessman, would listen to rap music. But then, he did turn his wife into a gigantic androgynous dick-girl - with an extra penis on her head, for crying out loud - which he then forced his son to mentally copulate with, WHILE his son is sitting inside a giant dildo-looking object that is then inserted into his wife. Stranger stuff has happened in the Evaverse. We're suggesting the possibility of Gendo going the extra mile and getting Yui an enormous thong-style bikini.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 26, 2013 1:35 am While there is some rap in Japan -- the ED for last year's Uta Koi series was in that style -- it'll have its own local flavour like everything else. Otherwise you're asking "if the cast were urban American, would it change things?" to which the answer is "Duh, yes."

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Mon Aug 26, 2013 3:53 am Ritsuko listened to punk rock in proposal Throwing that out there.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Aug 26, 2013 8:23 am I had mixed the words "Hoe", and "Trowel", thinking that a "Trow" was a farming tool (It was basically a hoe/rake of sorts). I had then proceeded to picture in my mind a farmer with a name tag reading "SimplyMason0" using such a tool to carve into the soil of the communal field that is Evageeks an image of Ritsuko partying to some punk rock music. It was glorious.

[]:             Quote Post by Deva Victrix » Mon Aug 26, 2013 8:55 pm SimplyMason0 wrote: Ritsuko listened to punk rock in proposal Trowing that out there.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Aug 27, 2013 5:06 pm SimplyMason0 wrote: Ritsuko listened to punk rock in proposal Trowing that out there.
